/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/audio_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/asr_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/speaker_diarization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/transcript_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MeetingTranscriber.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o bin/meeting-transcriber  -Wl,-rpath,/home/garywang/Desktop/project/meeting-transcriber/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.16.3/lib: ../onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.16.3/lib/libonnxruntime.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
